name: Anton Maurer
title: Software Developer & AI Enthusiast
about: I have been developing, programming, and architecting software for over 10 years. A significant part of my daily time goes into studying new information technologies and deepening existing knowledge. In recent years, I have been drawn to the AI industry — training models, running inference, developing custom models, and building agents. In today's reality, my skills keep me at the forefront of the technological world.

projects.name: Progressive Chat
projects.description: Creator of a fast and functional C++ client for Matrix — a decentralized, secure, and free messenger.

projects.name: Projectforge
projects.description: Contributing architecture improvements to this Kotlin web application by Micromata GmbH.

projects.name: Niche Projects
projects.description: Applied solutions in Java, Python, JS, Go, and other languages — tools built for real-world problems I have encountered.
